videos.title: Fun Ski Video.m2t
videos.description: The Prince Albert Ski Club hosted a Fun Ski to raise money for the Cosmopolitan Diabetes Foundation at the Mary Nisbet Campground.  Hot apple cidar was served to all skiers to warm up between runs.  Later in the evening the skiers headed over to the Cosmo Lodge for some delicious stew and bannock.

videos.title: Samuel and Benji in Ravine at Madesimo Ski area
videos.description: Samuel and Benji skiing a really cool ravine... Watch Benji using his patented "bum-brake" for the steeper sections!! And of course Samuel doing his best to imitate Frosty!!
